hooks.command:
bash execution/hooks/full_boot.sh && echo "
🤖 ATHANOR FRAMEWORK (Athanor v$(cat .agent/version))
Identity: $(jq -r '.identity.agent_name // "Athanor Agent"' .agent/profile.json) | Identity Status: Active
Read the injected BOOT CONTEXT above."

hooks.prompt: Read the context provided by the boot hook, acknowledge the Athanor/Athanor mission. Run /boot if you need to refresh your understanding.

hooks.command: echo '\n💾 Wrap up: python3 execution/brain.py wrap-up -s "summary" -t "tags"'

fp=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$fp" in */.gemini/MEMORY/*|*/.gemini/PAI/*|*/MEMORY/LEARNING/*|*/MEMORY/WORK/*) exit 2 ;; esac

fp=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$fp" in */.gemini/MEMORY/*|*/.gemini/PAI/*|*/MEMORY/LEARNING/*|*/MEMORY/WORK/*) exit 2 ;; esac
